svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="MCP Server Architecture" id="mcp-server"> <mxGraphModel dx="-694" dy="-232" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" value="AWS Cloud" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="740" width="1240" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="region" parent="aws-cloud" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" value="Region: ap-northeast-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="660" width="1160" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-gateway" parent="region" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.api_gateway;" value="API Gateway
(REST API)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="120" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lambda" parent="region" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.lambda;" value="Lambda
(MCP Processor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="400" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dynamodb" parent="region" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" value="DynamoDB
(Session Table)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="680" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="region" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.s3;" value="S3
(Model Artifacts)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="680" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloudwatch" parent="region" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch_2;" value="CloudWatch
Logs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="400" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iam" parent="region" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.iam_role;" value="IAM Role" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="400" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="alarm" parent="region" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.alarm;" value="CloudWatch
Alarm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="680" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn2" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;fontColor=#545B64;" target="lambda" value="Invoke"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn3" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;fontColor=#545B64;" target="dynamodb" value="Read/Write
Sessions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="580" y="280" /> <mxPoint x="580" y="220" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn4" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;fontColor=#545B64;" target="s3" value="Get/Put
Artifacts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="580" y="360" /> <mxPoint x="580" y="420" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn5" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;fontColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn6" edge="1" parent="region" source="iam" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;fontColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="lambda" value="Assumes"> style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;fontColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="alarm" value="Metrics"> style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="MCP Server Architecture on AWS" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F2F3F4;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fontSize=10;align=left;verticalAlign=top;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="320" x="1000" y="20" height="20" width="150" x="1010" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#545B64;" value="Dashed line: Monitoring/IAM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="1010" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#545B64;" value="ARM64 Lambda for cost optimization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="250" x="1010" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
